channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Dem senator calls GOP’s CLARITY ethics proposal a ‘piece of shit’: Politico
item.description: On Wednesday, Senate Republicans released the proposed text for the CLARITY Act, which has been met with pushback from Democrats regarding ethics provisions.

item.title: BitMEX delists 65 trading pairs, derivatives in July amid exchange shutdown
item.description: BitMEX will have removed 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs in July, compared with just 19 across the first six months of the year.

item.title: SEC sets September talks on move toward 24-hour stock trading
item.description: Nasdaq, Cboe and the London Stock Exchange are among major exchanges moving toward longer trading hours.

item.title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
item.description: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

item.title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
item.description: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

item.title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
item.description: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

item.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
item.description: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

item.title: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
item.description: Bitcoin price forecasts diverge as US-Iran war tensions fueled an ongoing oil and bond-market surge, while July Fed rate-hike odds neared 40%.

item.title: Clarity Act expected to miss its window before Congress' summer break, leadership says
item.description: The deadline to get the crypto market structure bill done before senators scatter will likely be missed, says Majority Leader Thune, though it may get a start before then.

item.title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
item.description: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto industry to contribute $55B to US economy in 2026: NCA study
item.description: The research released by the organization said that crypto companies will directly or indirectly lead to 232,000 jobs across the entire US economy in 2026.

item.title: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating
item.description: BitMEX’s shutdown marks the end of one of crypto’s earliest derivatives exchanges as analysts point to rising regulatory costs, market concentration and the shift toward licensed trading venues.

item.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
item.description: The deleted post touted a bogus "Vladhood" token as the mascot of Robinhood Chain—the latest fraud to exploit a network currently dominated by memes.

item.title: List of DATs who have abandoned Bitcoin and crypto accumulation strategies since: 🔴 Full Liquidations / Complete Exits Satsuma Technology (SATS LN) — Shareholders voted on July 21, 2026 (>>90% approval) to liquid all 668 BTC (~$43.5M), return capital - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBneTBlR2M3RDV1eGxsdFctckg5RkZEc0o2bk01RlNyak1KVUNMbG1WMUJxbHhudDFyOWtMUjhoN3hMbUFoT3NlVTJDUFFHTUFGZVBtcWFWQVFNRVNHN0RBMUlYMWc?oc=5" target="_blank">List of DATs who have abandoned…

item.title: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
item.description: The crypto asset manager thinks the four-year cycle is dead, suggesting Bitcoin's price will follow macro forces and the Fed's next move.

item.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X account hacked to promote token amid memecoin frenzy
item.description: The post, now deleted, touted a token called $VLAD and falsely claimed it would be listed on Robinhood.

item.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street lock them out
item.description: The former Signet developer aims to launch early next year a marketplace connecting stablecoin issuers with regional lenders to manage reserves.

item.title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked in apparent memecoin scam
item.description: A hacker reportedly took over Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev’s X account to promote a fake “VLAD” memecoin, posting what appeared to be a malicious token contract address.

item.title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
item.description: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

item.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon
item.description: Goldman chief David Solomon will support the crypto market structure bill now in Congress, even as financial companies and banks are hesitant over provisions on stablecoins.

item.title: Coinbase's corporate customers can now accept payments from AI agents
item.description: Rolling out this week, Coinbase Business users will be able to accept payments from AI agents, done via the x402 protocol, developed and incubated by the exchange.

item.title: Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
item.description: Both parties say they want US crypto market structure legislation, but a dispute over ethics rules and who enforces them is becoming the bill’s biggest obstacle.

item.title: BTC treasury firm Empery Digital invests $20M in AI data center developer Cardinal Data Power
item.description: The investment marks Empery’s latest push into AI infrastructure as the company shifts capital away from its Bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: Ethereum nears market bottom against Bitcoin, though key signals remain unconfirmed: CryptoQuant
item.description: Ether trades below its realized price while onchain indicators point to easing selling pressure and recovering demand, though a definitive cycle bottom has yet to emerge.

item.title: The SEC settles with Coinbase over its missing Gary Gensler texts
item.description: A new court status report reveals the agency will pay a flat fee to resolve a two-year fight over what former Chair Gary Gensler knew about Ethereum.

item.title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
item.description: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: It’s time for tokenization to get to work
New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $BILL (Billions Network) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9TYVBPZzRBRjNVc1ExTHA4RDBrTzM1RUtHTnpYY084cGd2Mk5KWWNyNjAwZWVVRTY2TFJnQnBpWW1EOXhJOUdnemdqNmRseVdtY0JWX0hxV1Q4NlZHQy1qekk2Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: Uniswap pushes deeper into tokenized assets with permissioned trading pools
item.description: The framework, developed with Superstate, Securitize and Dowgo, lets regulated funds and securities trade on Uniswap while enforcing compliance rules necessary for institutions.

item.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs Clarity Act despite banking industry's concerns over stablecoin rules
item.description: The Goldman Sachs CEO said the crypto market structure bill would create a more stable regulatory framework, breaking with other major bank leaders who oppose key stablecoin provisions.

item.title: Fears of AI-driven DeFi hack epidemic overstated for now — but not for long
item.description: Are the fears of an AI driven hacking epidemic totally overblown, or is this just the lull before the storm?

item.title: NEW: @Lombard_Finance adopts Chainlink to unlock cross-chain distribution for its Bitcoin Onchain Credit Strategy with @FlowTraders (Euronext: FLOW). Chainlink now powers secure cross-chain deposits of BTC.b and LBTC into the Strategy, expanding ac - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE96T1lnbHJzYW1YY2RkWG1PSWhpVVlVMU01QjdyX0JYVHQ5MlN4YzhzZEpoV1ZoU0pJZl9makU2OWl6Qk85WGdTU2NXXzJ6RkdfQl80MnhOTlpEbUctZ3dZ?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: @Lombard_Finance adopts Chainlink…

item.title: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
item.description: The partnership expands Binance’s compliance efforts by providing intelligence and training to help detect cryptocurrency activity tied to human trafficking and child exploitation.

item.title: Sad to see BitMex go. Some thoughts: BitMex pioneered 100x perps in crypto back in 2014. Delivery futures existed before then, making Fridays hectic. BTC deposits only, one chain only, withdrawals only once per day, through a multi-sig wallet. The constraint - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFB0VVZUQTQzNVpGX2wyTDNqMUZYWTdscTJ5LW56Y1BWNXFwSExfUTFnLVR6S2xobGg4SG1XYlhUWWthWWxFS3RBU1JhMHlQTk5KcURoZThmM3llQlJJeHdpRA?oc=5" target="_blank">Sad to see BitMex go. Some thoughts:…

item.title: Solana Changelog: July 23, 2026
item.description: An accepted fee SIMD sends 2500 lamports of base fees to validators, alongside new Agave, Firedancer, and program SDK releases.

item.title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network
item.description: A consortium led by Strategy and BlackRock has pledged $15 million to secure the Bitcoin network from the threat of a quantum computing breakthrough.

item.title: The KIDS Act is way worse than digital carding — it is a mass surveillance system
item.description: The fact that lawmakers are even contemplating a bill that would create a surveillance and censorship regime should be a wake-up call for everyone who values privacy and free expression, argues Electronic Frontier Foundation's India McKinn…

item.title: Deploying enterprise stablecoin rails on Solana in days with Crossmint
item.description: Read how Crossmint’s Solana infrastructure supports Western Union USDPT, fomo’s $4B volume, Tala wallets, and Wirex smart wallets.

item.title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy in a new group pledging $15 million to prepare Bitcoin for quantum threats
item.description: Members will direct funding independently, with the consortium taking no role in Bitcoin governance or protocol decisions.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor announces Strategy, BlackRock, Fidelity and Coinbase are pledging $15 million to support open source Bitcoin development "for the decades ahead." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9yYmpnOUY0YVF2bmF5ZjUteVZEQ09lenBScXMyZnFHN2FDYVdIa3ZhLTVLaVR3VFU2Vm41UUg1THlkQktSSkxiMnh3eXFfV0VDaEc0djFSM3JGRUJETXJDQnhocXNtbFk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor ann…

item.title: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN
item.description: Once-fragmented syndicates have fused into a single, tech-driven criminal economy that increasingly runs on crypto, the UNODC warns.

item.title: Bitget secures license for New Zealand expansion
item.description: Crypto exchange Bitget said it was registered as a financial service provider with New Zealand’s financial regulator, enabling it to expand its services in the country.

item.title: We’re proud to announce the launch of the Bitcoin Security Consortium, in partnership with BlackRock, Fidelity, Block, and more. Together we’ll support the long-term security of the Bitcoin network. Quantum computing is coming. Crypto needs to be ready. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5ULXNTOWZfYWtwMjR3STgzR3d5NlF1RHZUZGJaLXVlU3JoMVFxUDN5Nk9JMVNpWDFUdF9ONzRhaGdHQUZaR2YtR3VLMmlSRU9tVEI1UGF0el9lU1dkVUE?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re proud to announce the launch of t…

item.title: Strategy Launches Bitcoin Security Consortium With BlackRock, Coinbase and Others, Pledging $15 Million Over Three Years Strategy has launched the Bitcoin Security Consortium, with founding members including BlackRock, Coinbase, Galaxy, Anchorage, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBxcVJhZEpiVmlMYlVERTNMUTlrU2g4YW93OEFiRE9WMXEtM3JvMGlZT1libkRMaUtyY01xVFJRS1JPU0ozUVEydEY5d0xqTG5jZVZqYVIxZXMwdUU0emlwY1E2MA?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy Launches Bitcoin Securi…

item.title: Bitcoin’s security is a shared responsibility. Today we are launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, backed by $15 million in commitments to support the developers and researchers strengthening Bitcoin for the decades ahead. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5WTkRMMjFwM0J4ZDZlNWpfbVZqdlpmaThKYmtlekJ1bzZBbnJQY05YbFhnbGFFRmJBTDFoU3UtN1ZkVGkwQWNNTGwzQlJLRG8xb0RhZHR6dnlWOUk?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin’s security is a shared responsibili…

item.title: Morning Minute: Wall Street Moving Onchain Will Drive the Next Bull Market
item.description: At least that's what Bitwise's CIO believes. Plus Republicans publish new Clarity Act draft, and the SEC Commissioner has a warning for DeFi.

item.title: Today we're announcing the Bitcoin Security Consortium @BTCconsortium: a group of leading financial institutions and Bitcoin companies supporting the long-term security of the Bitcoin network. Members have pledged $15 million toward this work over the n - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5QQmdQLUgzX3pwRXg0ekswT05qTGp6T01MbW51Y2tXR05MZ1hOY3lzTERzQzhuQkFlY2hYVXM1T0htdGZmUVB6N3IwQVMtNV9rM01kNUQ2WTE3WjdjQWc?oc=5" target="_blank">Today we're announcing the Bitcoin Secu…

item.title: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
item.description: BitMEX’s BMEX token plunged about 90% after the exchange announced plans to shut down, ending nearly 12 years in business as its Bitcoin futures market share shrank.

item.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
item.description: The sovereign wealth-backed asset manager tapped KAIO to bring one of its private market funds onchain across Base, Solana and Sui networks.

item.title: What FATF’s 7th Crypto Compliance Report Card Means: Enforcement Must Catch Up With Legislation
item.description: Summary Laws are outpacing enforcement: While jurisdictions are increasingly adopting necessary regulations — from Travel Rule legislation to VASP licensing… The post What FATF’s 7th Crypto Compliance Report Card Means: Enforcement Must Ca…

item.title: Polymarket to challenge France’s nationwide website block
item.description: France’s regulator has said the platform still promoted illegal gambling and cited loss, identity-check and market-manipulation risks.

item.title: Bernstein says Bitcoin mining deals necessary for AI power crunch
item.description: Bernstein analysts remain bullish on the Bitcoin mining sector, as deals with third-party providers will be necessary to address the computing power limits of AI data centers.

item.title: Bulls face a test unlike anything in bitcoin's 17-year history
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 23, 2026

item.title: Crypto 'Wrench Attacks' Cost Victims $124M in Six Months, Up 12x: CertiK
item.description: Physical attacks on crypto holders are increasingly happening at home, and France has become the epicenter, a new report finds.

item.title: Crypto catches its breath as bitcoin settles into a holding pattern amid July rally
item.description: BTC is rangebound between $64,000 and $66,800 after a 13% recovery from July's lows, with macro markets offering little direction and WLFI the session's surprise standout at +12%.

item.title: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
item.description: The exploit hit a custody bridge AFX operates rather than the Arbitrum network itself, with the stolen funds quickly moved to Ethereum.

item.title: Someone keeps sending Satoshi Bitcoin. A Revolut user (or users) has sent Satoshi over $5,000 of Bitcoin in the past 2 days. What message are they trying to send? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9Ta2JBUlJCTUlTaXhoUlgxdU1tQWIzUi10SlZSd2hLR1RxanJwOHY1UXNydk95aUZobERtU0lXNHEteWJnUW5IbFl1Y1FrVGk1eWZjeWQwVFRRMms?oc=5" target="_blank">Someone keeps sending Satoshi Bitcoin. A Re…

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin slides as stocks slump on Iran war expansion, AI spending concern
item.description: Chipmaker Intel's revenue beat helped ease sentiment after a bruising session for tech stocks, with bitcoin holding near $65,000.

item.title: BitMEX to Close on September 23, Halts New Sign-Ups
item.description: The crypto derivatives pioneer told users to close positions and withdraw funds before it goes dark on September 23.
